rule_text: Declare documentation precedence at the top for non-trivial tasks (AGENT_RULES -> infra/system plan specializations -> results/run/structure/artifacts -> prompt exclusions).
State exact scope paths and forbid blind repo-wide scans unless explicitly requested.
notes: Improves relevance and reduces accidental drift.

rule_text: Specify task mode explicitly: analysis, infrastructure, or docs-only.
notes: Aligns allowed actions with agent type constraints.

rule_text: If MATLAB execution is requested, require wrapper-only invocation: tools/run_matlab_safe.bat <ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_SCRIPT.m>.
Require run-scoped outputs under results/<experiment>/runs/run_<timestamp>_<label>/.
Require canonical artifact folders (figures, tables, reports, review) and forbid invented alternatives.
notes: Include when artifact-producing tasks are expected.

rule_text: If observables are exported, keep observables.csv at run root and do not place it in tables/.
Require execution_status.csv at run root with exact canonical 5-column schema/order.
Require one run_manifest.json at run root; no secondary manifest system.
For infrastructure changes, enforce serial-only ownership and no parallel infra modifications.
Do not introduce parallel run roots, manifest systems, or fingerprint schemes.
For cross-module science tasks, require canonical status for all participating modules; do not claim full closure unless phase gates allow it.
notes: Normative rule with operational gate nuance.

rule_text: Name canonical entrypoint(s) and explicitly exclude deprecated/non-canonical alternatives.
Load minimal required docs first; expand only by explicit references required by the task.
Do not bulk-load docs listed in docs/agent_prompt_exclude.md unless explicitly named.
Treat contracts as normative and reports as evidence/history unless a report is explicitly requested.
Distinguish current repository layout from target model; avoid structural migration unless requested.
When module classification matters, align names/scope with docs/system_registry.json.
When relevant to data loading, preserve VALIDATION -> IO -> PIPELINE contract and avoid IO-layer enforcement logic.
List exact deliverable file paths and required sections/tables in the prompt.
Define concrete done checks (scope honored, required files produced, no forbidden actions).
Do not use docs/switching_canonical_definition.md as primary canonical authority because it is marked deprecated.
